Absolutely. Performance-enhancing drugs can push athletes to their limits, leading to better performances and greater skills honed over normal practice alone. Isn't that worth allowing in pro sports?

Absolutely, using of performance-enhancing drugs in professional sports shouldn't be banned. It's about reaching peak performance, isn’t it? Performance doesn’t lie, right?
